positive: A dramatic, cinematic concept art illustration of a bioluminescent forest guardian—a graceful, feathered creature with glowing crystalline wings. The setting is a misty, alien jungle at night, lit by glowing mushrooms and ethereal fog. High detail, fantasy art, digital painting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, cartoonish, simple sketch
